hero.title: Preserve Your Family Legacy Forever
hero.subtitle: Build your digital family tree, track your Gotra and Kul heritage, and share your history with generations to come. The only family tree app built specifically for the Indian culture.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your family's needs.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Perfect for individuals just starting out.

heritage.title: Deeply Rooted in Indian Heritage
heritage.subtitle: Traditional tools don't understand our culture. We built Vanshavali with features that actually matter to Indian families.

feat1.title: Gotra & Kul Tracking
feat1.desc: Preserve your lineage according to your community's traditions (Rajput, Brahmin, Jain, etc).

feat2.title: Native Village (Mool)
feat2.desc: Never lose connection to your ancestral village and roots in Bharat.

feat3.title: Joint Family Support
feat3.desc: Visualize complex joint family structures with ease, from patriarchs to the newest branch.

features.title: Powerful Tools for Your Family History
features.subtitle: Vanshavali provides a sophisticated canvas where you can map relationships, upload old photos, and record the stories of your ancestors. It's more than a tree; it's a living archive.
